💛 A Word From The Misso

Happy 48th, you absolute legend. You can fix anything with your hands, shred a dirt track on the KTM, carve a mountain on a snowboard, and still have brisket ready by 6pm.

Too bogan for the nerds. Too nerdy for the bogans. Too good at literally everything for the rest of us. 😤

The compound is your kingdom. The bikes are your pride. And me? Clearly your best life decision. 😘

Here's to 48 more years of metal music (still uck 🤘), bikes that go too fast, and coffee too good to share.

— Love, Zoe 💛
AKA Suga Mumma · The Bird · The Misso
